summary: Iteration 73: Tested new features - Cookie consent banner, CRM tile layout, Webhook delivery stats dashboard, and Email provider mutual exclusivity. Fixed route ordering bug in webhook delivery-stats endpoint. All core features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings for span inside select/option - minor console warning but doesn't affect functionality (same as iter72)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in /app/backend/routes/admin/webhooks.py - delivery-stats endpoint was being matched by {webhook_id} catch-all route. Moved delivery-stats route before the {webhook_id} route.
CookieConsent.tsx: Correctly implemented with 'Accept All' and 'Essential Only' buttons, localStorage persistence, and smooth animation
CRMTab.tsx: Tile layout implemented correctly with Zoho CRM tile and 'Coming Soon' placeholders for Salesforce and HubSpot
WebhooksTab.tsx: Delivery stats dashboard correctly fetches and displays success/failed/pending counts with recent failures
EmailSection.tsx: Mutual exclusivity implemented - clear messaging that only one provider can be active at a time

success_rate.backend: 91.7% (11/12 tests passed - 1 failed due to rate limiting during test execution)

seed_data_creation: Test webhook created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key features verified in iteration 73: 1) Cookie consent banner displays on page load for new users with 'Accept All' and 'Essential Only' buttons. 2) CRM tab shows tile layout with Zoho CRM provider and 'Coming Soon' placeholders for Salesforce and HubSpot. 3) Webhook delivery stats endpoint (/api/admin/webhooks/delivery-stats) returns success/failed/pending counts - was fixed for route ordering. 4) Email provider section in Website Content > Email Templates shows mutual exclusivity messaging.

admin_authentication.api_me_with_token: RATE_LIMITED (test failed due to rate limiting)

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Route ordering bug - /admin/webhooks/delivery-stats was being matched by /admin/webhooks/{webhook_id} catch-all route, causing 404 'Webhook not found' error
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Moved delivery-stats route definition before the {webhook_id} route to ensure proper matching

mocked_apis_note: Zoho Mail/CRM API calls are MOCKED (credentials can be saved but OAuth flow not complete). Email sending is MOCKED unless provider is validated and activated.
